executiveSummary: 4/4 US comply, 4/5 FR comply (FR-3 partially). 19 tests pass, tsc and lint clean. Refactor: inject BODY_FONT as CSS custom property to eliminate font string duplication.
minorObservations: basic-table.css inlines font string — drift risk with BODY_FONT constant.
Tests in src/tests/ rather than co-located with component.
refactorPlan: In index.tsx: pass BODY_FONT as --basic-table-font CSS custom property on <table>.
In basic-table.css: replace hardcoded font with var(--basic-table-font).
